name: 谛观·射覆 | Shefu Hexagram Analysis
description: 「谛观」出品：基于正易心法的卦脉解读技能。从卦画结构直接读取气的态势——爻位即气位，八卦为德性（健顺动入陷丽止说），观不是推，同构容纳。包含卦画默观、反对分析、卦脉流动、月建加权、落处展开、变复自校验六层分析工作流。不判断吉凶，展开可能性，启发自主判断。
description_en: Structural hexagram analysis based on Zheng Yi Xin Fa. Reads qi dynamics from hexagram line structures — line positions represent qi positions, the eight trigrams are functional virtues, observation precedes deduction. Includes six analysis layers: structural observation, opposition analysis, qi flow, monthly branch weighting, landing point expansion, and change-return self-verification.
